ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "airline_code" TEXT /* Code of the airline (e.g., AA, UA) */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code for the airline */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code for the airline */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the airline */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for customer support */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for customer support */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code of the airport (e.g., BOS, RDU) */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the airport */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the airport */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the airport in feet */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the airport */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "origin_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origin airport */,
  "destination_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination airport */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the route in miles */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the flight in hours */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* How often the route is served */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the route information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_origin_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_destination_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline operating the flight */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the flight is on */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Number of the flight */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Time of departure */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Time of arrival */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the flight */,
  "airplane_model" TEXT /* Model of the airplane used for the flight */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total number of seats on the flight */,
  "available_seats" INTEGER /* Number of available seats */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the flight in hours */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* How often the flight is operated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the flight information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of return */,
  "number_of_stops" INTEGER /* Number of stops */,
  "scheduled_departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time of departure */,
  "scheduled_arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time of arrival */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual time of departure */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual time of arrival */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number for the flight */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal number for the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the passenger */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the passenger */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "frequent_flyer_number" TEXT /* Frequent flyer number of the passenger */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program the passenger is enrolled in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number assigned to the passenger */,
  "passenger_type" TEXT /* Type of passenger (adult, child, infant) */,
  "meal_preference" TEXT /* Meal preference of the passenger */,
  "baggage_allowance" TEXT /* Baggage allowance for the passenger */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Any special requests */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the payment */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Last 4 digits of the credit card used for payment */,
  "card_expiry" TEXT /* Expiry date of the credit card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "estimated_departure_time" TEXT /* Estimated time of departure */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated time of arrival */,
  "reason_for_delay" TEXT /* Reason for any delay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_status_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "status_before_update" TEXT /* Status of the flight before the update */,
  "status_after_update" TEXT /* Status of the flight after the update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_updates_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review_comment" TEXT /* Comment made by the customer */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)
